rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Leandro Ferreira, Ramine Etow, Kim Bokholm
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious html page hosted on Object Storage Services.

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious html page hosted on Object Storage Services.
id: 9e352642-d557-4e84-ba30-ddac9d613700
description: Suspicious html page hosted on Object Storage Services. Often Maliscious/Phishing
status: experimental
author: NTT Security - Leandro Ferreira, Ramine Etow, Kim Bokholm
date: '2024-02-15'
modified: '2024-02-15'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|endswith:
    - .html
    - .htm
    cs-host|endswith:
    - .r2.dev
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate Pages
level: high
tags:
- attack.initial_access
